content_en: Nameemah, al- (ࡵI) - the spreading of information about others in order to cause harm or injury Naseehah (೸) - sincere conduct, sincere advice Nifaaq (JI.ii) - hypocrisy Nisf ( LI.....i) - half of something Nisyaan, al- (uǊI) - forgetfulness Niyyah (೹) - intention Noor (.JY) - a light Glossary Nushooz (j_,.!.;) - marital discord wherein one of the partners violates the rights of the other marriage partner Nutfah (.uJ...i) - "a drop of fluid," one of the stages that a human goes through in the fetus Orientalists - non-Muslims who study or write about Islam Qaadhi al-Qudha (•l...;.,.l -I.!) - the chief justice Qaaidah fiqhiyah (¥ •..ic.I.!) - a fiqh maxim or general principle that has applications that span a number of different fiqh areas Qabool, al- (J_,,.il ) - acceptance, as in accepting whatever the shahaadah implies. Qadar, al- (.J-lill) - Divine decree and preordainment Qadariyyah, al- (A..,i.J..lll ) - the sect that denies the concept of al-qadar Qalb (..,..Ii) - heart Qaraain (i.)l_;i) - circumstantial and indirect evidence Qasd, al- ( .i.....il ) - purpose, intent Qati'ee (Í) - definitive, certain; as opposed to dhanni which implies speculative or probable Qati'ee al-thaboot (u_,,ul Í) - definitively confirmed, no question for any doubt about it. Qawl or qaul (JL) - "statement," the scholars discuss statements of the heart (beliefs) as well as statements of the tongue Qiblah (ǋ) - the direction faced during the prayer, the direction of Makkah Qiyaas (0"49) - analogy Qiyaas faasid ( .l..il! 0"49) - an illogical or improper use of analogy. Qiyaas al-aks (೵I 0"49) - the opposite of the conclusion of an analogy for an opposite case. Qudsi (ǌ) - herein, it is used to refer to a hadith in which the Prophet (peace be upon him) transmits Allah's own words. Rabb (Y.J) - Lord, creator, one who nourishes and sustains Rahim (ି.J) - womb Rai ('-il.J) - personal opinion Rakat (W.J), also commonly rakah - a "unit" or portion of the ritual prayer or salaat Riba ('-u) - interest Riyaa (Ìl,u) - acting for the sake of show or to be seen by others. Rooh, al- (CJ.JI) - the spirit, as in the spirit that is breathed into a fetus and gives it life. Rububiyyah, al- (ǍJi.JI) - Related to the rabb (lord and creator) Rukhsah (ୀ.J) - exemption or permission from the shareeah to do something that is, under ordinary circumstances, not to be done. Sa (ti....) - this is a physical quantity of something; it is equivalent to an average sized man putting his two hands together and four times scooping up the quantity of something. Sabr (.>."-"') - patience, perseverance Sadaqa (Ui...) - charity, usually used for charity other than the obligatory zakah but sometimes it does mean the obligatory alms or zakah. Sadd al-dharai (ǎljll .l..i) - "blocking the means," this is a concept in Islamic fiqh where if it is found that an act leads to something unlawful, the preliminary act would also be considered unlawful Sadooq (L;J.i....) - honest, a middle level, acceptable narrator Sahih (( )- this is an authentic or verified hadith of the Prophet (peace be upon him). Commentary on the Forty Hadith of al-Nawawi Sahih al-Bukhari ('i.J֮I ã) - the most authentic compilation ofhadith; compiled by Imam al-Bukhari. Sahih lidhaatihi (...:i ୌ ã) - this is a hadith that reaches the level of sahih on its own merit, without the need for any corroborating evidence. Sahih lighairihi (•_>.;i.l ã) - this is a hadith that has been raised to the level of sahih due to corroborating or supporting evidence. Sahih Muslim (y ã) - the second most authentic compilation of hadith; compiled by Imam Muslim. Salaat (•)I....), also commonly salah - the Islamic ritual prayer; literally, it means supplication. Salaat al-Tasbeeh (ƵI •)I....) - This is a special prayer in which certain words of dhikr are repeated a number of times in each of the different movements of the prayer. Sala/, al- (Ul...JI) - the first three generation of Muslims, in particular, the Companions, and those who follow their path Salafi (ƶ) - one adhering to the way of the salaf Sami'iyyah attributes (֯) - These are the "attributes of Allah known through transmitted reports" and they cannot be "proven" a priori logically or rationally. Shaadh (ii...!.) - in hadith terminology, this refers to a hadith that is deemed weak because it is in open contradiction to what is narrated or reported through stronger sources or evidence. Shaam, al- (!'\..!JI) - "Greater Syria," encompassing most of what is today Syria, Lebanon, Palestine and Jordan Shabaab (Yְ) - youth Shabaan (uೳ) - the eighth month of the Islamic calendar Shahaadah (o.iÊ) - "testimony," herein it refers to the testimony of faith, "I bear witness that there is none worthy of worship except Allah and that Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah." Shaikh (&) - religious leader, scholar or respected person, also used for Sufi leaders Shareeah (էó)- Islamic law. Sharr (ó) - evil Sharl (.1.
content_id: Al-Namiimah — penyebaran informasi tentang orang lain dengan tujuan menyebabkan bahaya atau kerugian. Nasihat — perilaku yang tulus, saran yang tulus. Nifaq — kemunafikan. Nisf — separuh dari sesuatu. Al-Nisyan — kelupaan. Niyyah — niat. Nur — cahaya. Nusyuz — perselisihan pernikahan di mana salah satu pihak melanggar hak pasangan pernikahan yang lain. Nuthfah — 'setetes cairan', salah satu tahap yang dilalui manusia dalam masa janin. Orientalis — non-Muslim yang mempelajari atau menulis tentang Islam. Qadhi al-Qudha — hakim agung. Kaidah Fiqhiyyah — maksim atau prinsip umum fiqih yang memiliki penerapan yang mencakup sejumlah bidang fiqih yang berbeda. Al-Qabul — penerimaan, seperti menerima apa pun yang diimplikasikan oleh syahadat. Al-Qadar — ketetapan dan takdir Ilahi. Al-Qadariyyah — sekte yang mengingkari konsep al-qadar. Qalb — hati. Qarain — bukti tidak langsung dan berdasarkan keadaan. Al-Qasd — tujuan, niat. Qath'i — pasti dan definitif; berbeda dengan dhanni yang mengandung makna spekulatif atau kemungkinan besar. Qath'i al-Tsubut — terkonfirmasi secara pasti, tidak ada ruang sedikit pun untuk keraguan. Qaul — 'pernyataan'; para ulama membahas pernyataan hati (keyakinan) maupun pernyataan lisan. Kiblat — arah yang dihadap saat salat, arah Makkah. Qiyas — analogi. Qiyas Fasid — penggunaan analogi yang tidak logis atau tidak tepat. Qiyas al-'Aks — kebalikan dari kesimpulan analogi untuk kasus yang berlawanan. Qudsi — di sini, digunakan untuk merujuk pada hadis di mana Nabi ﷺ menyampaikan firman Allah sendiri. Rabb — Tuhan, Pencipta, Yang memelihara dan menopang. Rahim — rahim. Ra'y — pendapat pribadi. Rakaat — 'unit' atau bagian dari salat ritual. Riba — riba, bunga. Riya' — beramal demi pertunjukan atau untuk dilihat orang lain. Al-Ruh — ruh, seperti ruh yang ditiupkan ke dalam janin dan memberikannya kehidupan. Al-Rububiyyah — berkaitan dengan rabb (Tuhan dan Pencipta). Rukhsah — pengecualian atau izin dari syariat untuk melakukan sesuatu yang dalam keadaan biasa tidak boleh dilakukan. Sa' — ini adalah takaran fisik dari sesuatu; setara dengan seorang pria berbadan sedang yang mengatupkan kedua tangannya dan menyendok sesuatu sebanyak empat kali. Sabar — kesabaran, keteguhan. Sedekah — amal, biasanya digunakan untuk amal selain zakat wajib tetapi terkadang juga berarti zakat wajib itu sendiri. Sadd al-Dzara'i' — 'menutup jalan'; ini adalah konsep dalam fiqih Islam di mana jika ditemukan bahwa suatu perbuatan mengarah pada sesuatu yang tidak sah, perbuatan awal tersebut juga akan dianggap tidak sah. Shaduq — jujur, perawi tingkat menengah yang dapat diterima. Sahih — ini adalah hadis yang otentik atau terverifikasi dari Nabi ﷺ. Sahih al-Bukhari — kumpulan hadis paling otentik; disusun oleh Imam al-Bukhari. Sahih lidzatihi — hadis yang mencapai tingkat sahih berdasarkan kualitasnya sendiri, tanpa memerlukan bukti penguat. Sahih lighairihi — hadis yang dinaikkan ke tingkat sahih karena adanya bukti yang menguatkan atau mendukung. Sahih Muslim — kumpulan hadis paling otentik kedua; disusun oleh Imam Muslim. Salat — salat ritual Islam; secara harfiah berarti doa. Salat al-Tasbih — ini adalah salat khusus di mana kata-kata dzikir tertentu diulang beberapa kali dalam setiap gerakan salat. Al-Salaf — tiga generasi pertama umat Islam, khususnya para Sahabat, dan mereka yang mengikuti jalan mereka. Salafi — seseorang yang mengikuti jalan salaf. Sifat Sam'iyyah — 'sifat-sifat Allah yang diketahui melalui laporan yang diteruskan' dan tidak dapat 'dibuktikan' secara logis atau rasional a priori. Syadz — dalam terminologi hadis, merujuk pada hadis yang dianggap lemah karena bertentangan secara nyata dengan apa yang diriwayatkan atau dilaporkan melalui sumber-sumber atau bukti yang lebih kuat. Al-Syam — 'Suriah Raya', mencakup sebagian besar wilayah yang kini menjadi Suriah, Lebanon, Palestina, dan Yordania. Syabab — pemuda. Sya'ban — bulan kedelapan dalam kalender Islam. Syahadat — 'kesaksian'; di sini merujuk pada kesaksian iman: 'Aku bersaksi bahwa tidak ada yang berhak disembah selain Allah dan bahwa Muhammad adalah Rasulullah.' Syaikh — pemimpin agama, ulama atau orang yang dihormati; juga digunakan untuk pemimpin Sufi. Syariat — hukum Islam. Syarr — kejahatan.
content_ar: Nameemah, al- (ࡵI) - the spreading of information about others من أجل cause harm or injury Naseehah (೸) - sincere السلوك, sincere advice Nifaaq (JI.ii) - hypocrisy Nisf ( LI.....i) - half of something Nisyaan, al- (uǊI) - forgetfulness Niyyah (೹) - intention Noor (.JY) - a light Glossary Nushooz (j_,.!.;) - marital discord wherein one of the partners violates the الحقوق of the other marriage partner Nutfah (.uJ...i) - "a drop of fluid," one of the stages that a human goes through in the fetus Orientalists - non-المسلمون who study or write about الإسلام Qaadhi al-Qudha (•l...;.,.l -I.!) - the chief العدل Qaaidah fiqhiyah (¥ •..ic.I.!) - a الفقه maxim or general principle that has applications that span a number of different الفقه areas Qabool, al- (J_,,.il ) - acceptance, as in accepting whatever the shahaadah implies. القدر, al- (.J-lill) - Divine decree and preordainment Qadariyyah, al- (A..,i.J..lll ) - the sect that denies the concept of al-القدر Qalb (..,..Ii) - القلب Qaraain (i.)l_;i) - circumstantial and indirect evidence Qasd, al- ( .i.....il ) - purpose, intent Qati'ee (Í) - definitive, certain; as opposed to dhanni which implies speculative or probable Qati'ee al-thaboot (u_,,ul Í) - definitively confirmed, no question for any doubt about it. Qawl or qaul (JL) - "statement," the العلماء discuss statements of the القلب (beliefs) as well as statements of the tongue القبلة (ǋ) - the direction faced خلال the الصلاة, the direction of مكة المكرمة Qiyaas (0"49) - analogy Qiyaas faasid ( .l..il! 0"49) - an illogical or improper use of analogy. Qiyaas al-aks (೵I 0"49) - the opposite of the conclusion of an analogy for an opposite case. Qudsi (ǌ) - herein, it is used to refer to a الحديث in which النبي ﷺ (ﷺ) transmits الله's own words. Rabb (Y.J) - Lord, creator, one who nourishes and sustains Rahim (ି.J) - womb Rai ('-il.J) - personal opinion الركعات (W.J), أيضاً commonly الركعة - a "unit" or portion of the ritual الصلاة or salaat Riba ('-u) - interest Riyaa (Ìl,u) - acting for the sake of show or to be seen by others. Rooh, al- (CJ.JI) - the الروح, as in the الروح that is breathed into a fetus and gives it الحياة. Rububiyyah, al- (ǍJi.JI) - Related to the rabb (lord and creator) Rukhsah (ୀ.J) - exemption or permission from the shareeah to do something that is, under ordinary circumstances, not to be done. Sa (ti....) - this is a physical quantity of something; it is equivalent to an average sized man putting his two hands together and four times scooping up the quantity of something. الصبر (.>."-"') - الصبر, perseverance Sadaqa (Ui...) - الصدقة, usually used for الصدقة other than the obligatory الزكاة but sometimes it does mean the obligatory الصدقة or الزكاة. Sadd al-dharai (ǎljll .l..i) - "blocking the means," this is a concept in Islamic الفقه where إذا it is found that an act leads to something unlawful, the preliminary act would أيضاً be considered unlawful Sadooq (L;J.i....) - honest, a middle level, acceptable narrator S
